inputs.label: Phase A Voltage (V)
inputs.businessContext: Measured line-to-neutral voltage of phase A

inputs.label: Phase B Voltage (V)
inputs.businessContext: Measured line-to-neutral voltage of phase B

inputs.label: Phase C Voltage (V)
inputs.businessContext: Measured line-to-neutral voltage of phase C

inputs.label: Phase A Angle (deg)
inputs.businessContext: Phase angle of phase A voltage

inputs.label: Phase B Angle (deg)
inputs.businessContext: Phase angle of phase B voltage

inputs.label: Phase C Angle (deg)
inputs.businessContext: Phase angle of phase C voltage

formulas.v1_real: (va_complex_real + vb_complex_real * Math.cos(2*Math.PI/3) - vb_complex_imag * Math.sin(2*Math.PI/3) + vc_complex_real * Math.cos(-2*Math.PI/3) - vc_complex_imag * Math.sin(-2*Math.PI/3)) / 3
formulas.v1_imag: (va_complex_imag + vb_complex_real * Math.sin(2*Math.PI/3) + vb_complex_imag * Math.cos(2*Math.PI/3) + vc_complex_real * Math.sin(-2*Math.PI/3) + vc_complex_imag * Math.cos(-2*Math.PI/3)) / 3
formulas.v2_real: (va_complex_real + vb_complex_real * Math.cos(-2*Math.PI/3) - vb_complex_imag * Math.sin(-2*Math.PI/3) + vc_complex_real * Math.cos(2*Math.PI/3) - vc_complex_imag * Math.sin(2*Math.PI/3)) / 3
formulas.v2_imag: (va_complex_imag + vb_complex_real * Math.sin(-2*Math.PI/3) + vb_complex_imag * Math.cos(-2*Math.PI/3) + vc_complex_real * Math.sin(2*Math.PI/3) + vc_complex_imag * Math.cos(2*Math.PI/3)) / 3
